lines.speaker: Knights
lines.text: We're Knights of the Party Room

lines.speaker: Knights
lines.text: We dance round and round like a loon

lines.speaker: Knights
lines.text: Quite often we like to sing

lines.speaker: Knights
lines.text: We're Knights of the Party Room

lines.speaker: Knights
lines.text: Do you like our helmet plumes?

lines.speaker: Knights
lines.text: Everyone's happy now we can move

lines.speaker: Knights
lines.text: Like a party animal in the groove

lines.speaker: Party Pete
lines.text: The party room is a silly place!
